name: agentlint-monorepo
description: agentlint — lint & security-check your AI coding agent configuration (Claude Code & MCP)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace agentlint-core && npm run build --workspace agentlint-cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace agentlint-core && npm run test --workspace agentlint-cli
scripts.release: npm run build && npm publish --workspace agentlint-core && npm publish --workspace agentlint-cli
